title: Colored Bricks
description: Adds a different variant of each brick, for blocks, stairs, slabs, and walls, for all 16 colors there are in Minecraft as well as cracked versions of each. Also adds chiseled bricks and colored pots.
body:
Colored Bricks supports 1.16-1.21.x!
When using my mod, please make sure you are using the appropriate Forge or Fabric version.

Latest version 5.2

 

This mod includes brick walls, stairs, slabs, and blocks. One for each of the 16 vanilla Minecraft colors. And cracked versions of those! It also adds colored pots, chiseled bricks, and brick ingots for each of the colors as well.

These are great and designed for building projects!

 

There is support for German (translated by CptPICHU on Curseforge), support for Chinese Taiwan, Japanese (translated by [sae220](https://github.com/sae220) on GitHub), Russian (translated by [Alexander317](https://github.com/Alexander317)), and Czech! If you want to translate another language, please make a pull request on the GitHub. It will be greatly appreciated!

If you have feature requests or issues, you can submit them on the GitHub as well. :)

You can also find this mod on [CurseForge!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/colored-bricks-mod)
